description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has a ribbed V-neck, short sleeves, thin horizontal stripes on the upper chest and embroidered Roger Federer logo on the upper left chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowWarm iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryGet moving with this white Federer Trophy Stripe T-shirt from nike that is inspired by one of the greatest players ever to hit the courts. The classic, comfortable Fit is complemented the shallow V-neck that provides a non-restrictive fit, while the organic cotton that's super soft to the touch provides all day comfort. The “RF” monogram on the left chest pays tribute to Roger Federer, while the stripe across the front offers subtle styling. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a quiet, well groomed look.
